description: Project entity for tracking initiatives with lifecycle and ownership.
semantic_description: A project represents a planned initiative with start/end dates, ownership, and a lifecycle from planning through completion.
lifecycle_description: PLANNING → active → ON_HOLD (↔ active) → completed; also PLANNING/active → cancelled

description: Task within a project. Tracks work items with assignee and due date.
semantic_description: A work item belonging to a project. Assigned to a team member with priority and due date tracking.

description: Project milestone marking key deliverables or deadlines.
semantic_description: A significant checkpoint in a project timeline. Tracks whether key deliverables are reached on schedule.
